TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kilang, title = kilang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kilang} }

S.FORM: kilang (kamu nu Hulam: ś®Ļ ) kilang ś®Ļ ahebal ku nipalumaan ni Panay tu kilang. Panay Á®ģÁöĄś®ĻŚĺąŚĮ¨. kilakilangan ś®Ļśěó kilakilangan kina buyu' nu Maibul. .
S.PHON: kir~…ĺaŇč (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: * ) kir~…ĺaŇč * ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nipar~…ĺumaan ni panaj tu kir~…ĺaŇč. panaj *****. kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan ** kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan kina buju Ē~ ° nu maibur~…ĺ. .
